senses.gloss: a rope, a cable; a hawser; a cord; a string; a thread
a rope, a cable; a hawser; a cord; a string; a thread; something resembling, likened to, or related to a rope (such as a ray, a beam, a jet, a vein, and so on)

examples.text: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
examples.english: We have created man and know what his spirit suggests to him, and We are closer to him than the rope of his [jugular] vein.
